# Supported Surface Matrix

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-supported-surface-matrix.mjs. Do not edit by hand. -->

This matrix records the currently supported React component surface. It is a
readiness view, not a promise that every component is production complete.

Maturity labels:

- **Hardened starter**: source, contract, preview, unit tests, browser smoke
  coverage, and targeted a11y/focus/interaction assertions exist for the risky
  primitive behavior.
- **Starter**: source, contract, preview, unit tests, and browser smoke coverage
  exist, with a11y behavior documented or covered at the contract/state level.
- **Uncovered**: a required source, contract, preview, or unit reference is
  missing and the component should not be considered supported.

| Component | Maturity | Source | Docs | Preview | Tests | A11y / focus coverage | Known gaps |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Accordion | Starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/accordion.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/accordion.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/accordion.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Slots, roles or ARIA state where applicable, content resilience, and browser preview layout are covered. | Accordion does not manage analytics or persistence.; Accordion does not replace tabs for peer page sections. |
| ActionMenu | Starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/action-menu.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/action-menu.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/action-menu.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Interactive roles, labels, state attributes, and keyboard/focus behavior are covered by unit tests or Radix-backed contracts. | ActionMenu does not include search or nested choices. |
| ActionWidget | Starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/action-widget.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/action-widget.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/action-widget.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Slots, roles or ARIA state where applicable, content resilience, and browser preview layout are covered. | ActionWidget does not enforce one primary action.; ActionWidget does not provide loading, disclosure, or selection behavior.; ActionWidget does not infer heading semantics from `ActionWidgetTitle`. |
| AlertDialog | Starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/alert-dialog.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/alert-dialog.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/alert-dialog.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Slots, roles or ARIA state where applicable, content resilience, and browser preview layout are covered. | AlertDialog does not provide async confirmation state.; AlertDialog does not include form submission behavior. |
| Alert | Starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/alert.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/alert.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/alert.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Slots, roles or ARIA state where applicable, content resilience, and browser preview layout are covered. | Alert does not auto-dismiss.; Alert does not replace field-level validation wiring. |
| Amount | Starter | [source](../../packages/react/src/components/amount.tsx) | [contract](../agent/components/amount.md) | [preview](../../examples/react/src/component-previews/amount.preview.tsx) | [unit](../../packages/react/src/components/components.test.tsx), [browser smoke](../../scripts/check-react-preview-browser.mjs) | Slots, roles or ARIA state where applicable, content resilience, and browser preview layout are covered. | Amount does not parse formatted input text back into numeric values.; Amount does not provide menus for selecting currencies or assets.; Amount does not own form labels, submit behavior, or validation summaries. |

## Maintenance

- Run `pnpm docs:reference:sync` after adding or changing component source,
  previews, or known limitations.
- Keep deeper interaction coverage on the hardened starter path for Dialog,
  BottomSheet, Menu, Select, Popover, Toast, and Tabs.
- Add true browser-level focus-trap assertions only when the preview harness can
  drive modal focus without making every story stateful.
